mapper.select:
SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(cm.id), 0) as chatCount, COALESCE(SUM(cm.input_tokens), 0) as inputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(cm.output_tokens), 0) as outputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN gc.type = 'image' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as imageCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN gc.type = 'video' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as videoCount FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN chat_session cs ON u.id = cs.user_id LEFT JOIN chat_message cm ON cs.session_id = cm.session_id AND cm.role = 'assistant' AND DATE(cm.create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} LEFT JOIN ai_generated_content gc ON u.id = gc.user_id AND gc.status = 1 AND DATE(gc.create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} WHERE u.deleted = 0
AND u.id = #{userId}
